title: Assessment of rural livelihoods in a lakeside community, Ngegu Beach, Homa Bay, Kenya  Evidence for Development Working Paper  9
author: Ngoleka, S
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The report describes household economy in a lakeshore village in Homa Bay county, Kenya. A quantitative, household economy approach, the Individual Household Method (IHM) was used, complemented by additional focus group interviews focusing on drivers of change and adaptation
steps_raw: The report describes household economy in a lakeshore village in Homa Bay county, Kenya. A quantitative, household economy approach, the Individual Household Method (IHM) was used, complemented by additional focus group interviews focusing on drivers of change and adaptation
keywords: Household Economy Approach, Individual Household Method (IHM)
